title: 2019 Summer League Winners
excerpt: Another great summer league season wrapped up last night. Congrats to the winning teams! content:
Another great summer league season wrapped up last night. Congrats to the winning teams!

Tuesday Division One: Ryan Black, Trevor Belanger, Calvin Carlson and Andrew Fisher 
Tuesday Division Two: Jordan Torbiak, David Mair and Daryn Hobal
Thursday Division 1: Jeff Williams, Devon Halko, Carolyn Binns and Harrison Tchir
Thursday Division 2: Lindsay Buchanan, Ian Adatia, Jennifer Black and Tanya Mundy
